# ResearchAI — Intelligent Document Analysis Platform

ResearchAI is a secure, vector-powered platform designed for academic researchers, engineers, and analysts to upload PDF documents and extract summaries, key metrics, and answers.

## Architecture and Core Functionality
- **Vite React Frontend SPA**: Handles authentication (with optional 2FA), workspace management, chat context filtering, document uploading, and real-time response streaming.
- **FastAPI Backend Services**: Runs local PDF parsing, embedding vectorization with ChromaDB, chunk retrieval, and LLM text generation.
- **Database Engine**: Uses SQLite for session management, chats logs, and message histories.

## Public Endpoint Targets
- Main Workspace: https://ai-research-assistant-tan.vercel.app/
- API Backend Host: https://api-research-assistant-bseo.onrender.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://ai-research-assistant-tan.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://ai-research-assistant-tan.vercel.app/terms
